REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, SUSTAINED IN PART AND OVERRULED IN PART. MONICA HUDJAZI DEMURRER AS TO ADAMS, WHITE, PERKYNS, AND LIVINGSTONE'S CAUSES OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED AND THE ACTION IS STAYED AS TO THESE PLAINTIFFS ONLY FOR THEM TO OBTAIN A DETERMINATION FROM THE BANKRUPTCY COURT WHETHER ANY, PART, OR ALL OF THEIR CLAIMS FALL WITHIN THE SCOPE OF AUTOMATIC STAY. IN RE MARIAGE OF SPRAGUE & SPIEGEL-SPRAGUE (2003) 105 CAL.APP.4TH 215. (THE COURT NOTES THAT NO EXHIBITS WERE ATTACHED TO DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE FILED ON NOVEMBER 10, 2016. PLAINTIFF DID NOT DISPUTE THE FACT OF BANKRUPTCY FILING ON MARCH 1, 2013). DEMURRER IS OTHERWISE OVERRULED. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). (501)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-19-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Kurt Bridgman, 415-981-6630 for Defendants/Moving parties 376 Ellis Street, LLC, Monica Hujazi and SF Corners, LLC.
James Lucey, 415-504-2165 for Plaintiff/Opposing party Rian Adams.

Argued. counsel for the Defendants wants the Court to issue a stay and left the Bankruptsy Court decide the matter. Counsel for the Plaintiff argues that the should overule the motion. The Court rules as follows: DEFENDANT 376 ELLIS STREET, LLC, MONICA HUJAZI, SF CORNERS, LLC's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is Taken Under Submission. Proposed orders conforming with the tentative ruling to be submitted by next week. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Reported: Chris Te Selle, CSR#10836, 415-274-9977. (501)
